timeline.canonical_description: Purchased first stock (Cities Service Preferred), demonstrating early interest in investing

evidence.snippet: Buffett bought his first stock at age 11

timeline.canonical_description: Established his first investment partnership in Omaha, Nebraska, beginning professional investing career

evidence.snippet: In 1956, Buffett founded Buffett Partnership Ltd

timeline.canonical_description: Started purchasing shares of Berkshire Hathaway textile company, which would become his investment vehicle

evidence.snippet: Buffett began buying shares of Berkshire Hathaway in 1962

timeline.canonical_description: Net worth exceeded $1 billion as Berkshire Hathaway share price increased

evidence.snippet: became a billionaire when Berkshire Hathaway began selling class A shares

timeline.canonical_description: Pledged to donate 99% of fortune to philanthropic causes, primarily through the Gates Foundation

evidence.snippet: announced intention to give away 99% of his wealth to charity
